ADAYLARDA ARANACAK ÖZEL KOŞULLAR

General Requirements

: You may enroll in a program with thesis or non-thesis option, For the thesis option, commonly, you will be required to take 7 or more courses in a minimum of two semesters and work for thesis which typically lasts about 2 semesters or more. The non-thesis option means you are rqeuired to take 10 or more courses in about 3 semesters and a project needs to be done in a minimum of one semester. Please check details of each program as it may vary.

Sevgili öğrencilerimiz,
